title: chylismia heterochroma
intro: Chylismia heterochroma, also known as the desert marigold, is a perennial plant that belongs to the evening primrose family. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chylismia heterochroma include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
